resources.string: Preferences cannot load until module is enabled after a reboot.
Ensure system is enabled in scope with Wi-Fi connected after a reboot.
Override enabled: custom MAC in use
Override disabled: default MAC in use
\"Use randomized MAC\" must be selected in \"Privacy\" under \"Network details\" in Settings
Force support for randomization and show \"Privacy\" section in \"Network details\"
MAC saved. Reconnect to apply changes.
Error: MAC address must be 48 bits long (e.g. 00:11:22:AA:BB:CC).
Error: MAC address must not be all zeros.
Error: MAC address must have an even first octet.
Requires hardware driver support for MAC randomization. Reboot required for \"%s\".
